series_metadata.series_description: This includes supporting information including worksheets, notes, and TE-Forms. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to CMS then CMS creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish]. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain on shared electronic database (Site Manager) permanently., Electronic: Permanent
